groups.name: Recommended
groups.description: High-impact plugins most teams benefit from

items.label: Context7
items.description: Live documentation lookup via MCP — eliminates hallucinated APIs

items.label: Superpowers
items.description: Workflow orchestration — structured planning, TDD, debugging, git worktrees

items.label: Code Review
items.description: Automated PR review posted as GitHub comments (5 parallel agents)

items.label: Feature Dev
items.description: Guided 7-phase feature development with exploration, architecture, and review

items.label: TypeScript LSP
items.description: IDE-grade code intelligence — go-to-definition, find references, error checking

groups.name: Optional
groups.description: Useful but situational — enable based on your stack

items.label: PR Review Toolkit
items.description: 6 specialized review agents — includes code-simplifier, type analyzer, silent failure hunter

conflicts.reason: PR Review Toolkit includes an identical code-simplifier agent

items.label: Figma
items.description: Design-to-code bridge — extracts layout, tokens, and component mappings from Figma files

items.label: CLAUDE.md Management
items.description: Audit and revise CLAUDE.md files — captures session learnings as diffs

groups.name: Output Style
groups.description: Pick at most one — they change how Claude communicates

items.label: Learning
items.description: Pauses at decision points for you to write code + educational insights (superset of Explanatory)

conflicts.reason: Learning style already includes all Explanatory features

items.label: Explanatory
items.description: Adds educational insights about implementation choices and codebase patterns

conflicts.reason: Explanatory is a subset of Learning — don't enable both

items.label: None
items.description: Use default Claude Code output style

items.label: Statusline
items.description: Custom status bar with worktree detection, model name, context battery, and cost
